🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert HEIC to JPG on Mac

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your HEIC files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

On a Mac you can open HEIC in Preview, but exporting each photo by hand is slow, and you may not want to install a converter app just for this. This page does it in your browser — Safari, Chrome, or Firefox — with no app and no upload. Drop a folder of HEIC photos and get JPGs in seconds.

How to convert

  1. Open this page in your Mac browser.
  2. Drag HEIC files from Finder straight into the box.
  3. Download the JPGs to your Downloads folder.

FAQ

Why not just use Preview?

Preview works for one file at a time. This handles many at once and needs no manual Export step for each photo.

Related converters

HEIC to JPGHEIC to PNGPNG to JPGWEBP to JPG

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
